ops.body: Lane B COMPLETE — all ship gates pass; full results + caveats on WF-A ledger 556d952f2 (2026-07-21 entry, attachments bstrip_final.json + bstrip_measure_v3.json). Patch uncommitted in /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-wb: cached_judge ClaudeConfig gains tools="" + disable_slash_commands=True, plus a spec-pinning test. One deviation from the task title's route: max_turns is NOT set — on the --json-schema path the structured output is a tool_use round and num_turns varies 2-4, so max_turns=1 (and even 2) intermittently kills valid runs with error_max_turns (13/14 died at 1); with tools="" there is no agentic surface to bound. Measured (sonnet, n=14, pre-registered protocol): usd/row $0.0654 -> $0.0417 (0.638x), input-side tok/row 50,376 -> 18,103 (~32K baseline stripped), category agreement 0.917 >= 0.750 floor, accept 12/12 parity. No version bumps (identity is (dedup_key, role, prompt_version); prompt text untouched). Workspace gates: pytest exit 0, Linux docker ty clean, docs n/a.
